query:
INSERT INTO streaming_status (broadcast_id, platform, status, stream_url, bitrate, resolution, frame_rate, latency) VALUES
('rrb-radio-main', 'website', 'live', 'https://stream.rrb-radio.com/live', 320, '320kbps', 0, 150),
('rrb-radio-main', 'youtube', 'live', 'https://youtube.com/live/rrb-radio', 256, '720p', 30, 2000),
('rrb-radio-gospel', 'website', 'live', 'https://stream.rrb-radio.com/gospel', 256, '256kbps', 0, 120),
('rrb-radio-healing', 'website', 'live', 'https://stream.rrb-radio.com/healing', 192, '192kbps', 0, 100),
('hybridcast-emergency', 'website', 'offline', 'https://stream.hybridcast.io/emergency', 128, '128kbps', 0, 50),
('rrb-radio-jazz', 'website', 'live', 'https://stream.rrb-radio.com/jazz', 320, '320kbps', 0, 130),
('canryn-showcase', 'website', 'offline', 'https://stream.canryn.com/showcase', 256, '256kbps', 0, 200),
('sweet-miracles', 'facebook', 'offline', 'https://facebook.com/live/sweet-miracles', 192, '720p', 30, 3000);
